---
title: C. Get the code
---

Clone the submission pipeline repository **with its submodules**, create your
`.env`, and pull the container images with `make pull`.

::: {.callout-note}
## Coming soon
This page is part of the manual's skeleton. Its content is being written in
[issue #7](https://github.com/JeroenUMC/bp-sweden-web/issues/7).
:::
